This lowers the risk of concussions. So the key point here is that the newer helmets reduce the head's speed gain after impact, which in turn reduces concussion risk. The question is asking for his opinion on the newer helmets. The options are: A) They vary a lot in size. B) They work better than the old ones. C) They slow down the player's running speed. D) They allow the players to move their heads more freely. The passage states that the newer helmets make the head not gain speed as much after a hit. This implies that they are more effective than older helmets, which would make option B correct.
